final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a product launch announcement on Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book).

Style/medium: editorial magazine cover aesthetic, clean contemporary layout with premium typography, inspired by Kinfolk or Monocle editorial design
Composition: diagonal composition with dynamic visual flow from top-left to bottom-right, generous white space, asymmetrical balance
Subject: product launch announcement featuring "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as hero text elements, minimalist graphic accents
Scene/backdrop: solid or subtly textured background, no distracting scenery, focus entirely on typography and layout
Lighting/mood: high contrast lighting, dramatic shadows for depth, sophisticated and confident mood
Color palette: high contrast accent color (deep navy, burnt orange, or forest green) against neutral base (off-white or soft gray), limited palette for premium feel
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must work as 3:4 vertical cover image for Xiaohongshu platform; text must remain legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: gradient overload, generic stock imagery, drop shadows on text, cluttered layout, Behance generic flat style, 8K stuffer words
